qa_pair.question: Using only read-only catalog metadata, count the total number of APIs exposed by this MCP package. Respond with an integer only.
Find the family with the highest API count in catalog metadata. Respond with the family key only.
Compute the difference between the counts of ministry_list and ministry_info families. Respond with an integer only.
Locate the API entry with the highest numeric index in the catalog. Return its guide_html_name only.
Among APIs where supported_types is exactly HTML (and not XML/JSON), find the one with the highest index. Return its guide_html_name only.
Identify the family whose catalog count is exactly 20. Return the family key only.
From generated_tool_metadata, return the generated_count value as an integer.
How many generated tools require an agency parameter? Respond with an integer only.
For the collapsed generated tool api_committee_decision, count supported_agencies. Respond with an integer only.
For api_ministry_interpretation, return the first supported agency code in its listed order.
